header.title: My Profile
header.subtitle: Manage voice fingerprints and default settings

timezone.primaryDesc: All times you see are displayed in this timezone. If you are a Korean national living abroad, set this to your current city.
timezone.referenceDesc: Timezones you check often appear alongside yours in the sidebar clock.

basic.accountDesc: Your username, email, and default language apply across every workspace.
basic.name: Name
basic.nameEnHint: Optional — shown to users with English UI
basic.usernameHelp: Use this to sign in instead of email.
basic.usernameLocked: Your username is a permanent safety identifier and cannot be changed once set.
basic.usernameSetHelp: Choose carefully — you cannot change this later.
basic.secondaryEmailHint: Used for recovery if you forget your username or primary email. Only verified addresses are active.
basic.languageHint: Used as the default for meeting translation

workspaceProfile.desc: Your name and English name only apply to this workspace. If you belong to other workspaces, you can set them separately there.
workspaceProfile.nicknamePlaceholder: How members of this workspace see your name
workspaceProfile.nicknameUsage: Where this is used: Q Talk sender · Q Task assignee · comments & mentions · member list · everywhere inside this workspace
workspaceProfile.nicknameEnUsage: Where this is used: Members & clients viewing in English see this instead of your nickname above (optional)

emailChange.title: Change Email
emailChange.step1Desc: Enter your new email address to receive a 6-digit verification code.
emailChange.step2Desc: Enter the 6-digit code sent to {{email}}. Valid for 10 minutes.

errors.expired: Code expired. Please request a new one.
errors.locked: Locked after 5 failed attempts. Try again in 1 hour.

qnoteProfile.workspaceScopeNote: This profile applies only to the current workspace. Q Note uses it as your personal context when generating answers.
qnoteProfile.sectionTitle: My Profile (for Q note answer generation)
qnoteProfile.description: Information Q note uses to <1>answer as "me"</1> during meetings. Filling in job title/company/expertise/bio helps the AI speak on your behalf with more accurate and natural answers.<2></2>If empty, answers fall back to generic AI responses.
qnoteProfile.expertisePlaceholder: e.g. IoT, UX design, market analysis
qnoteProfile.bioPlaceholder: e.g. 8 years in LG Electronics product planning, smart-home strategy lead. Recently focused on AI-driven personalization.
qnoteProfile.bioHint: The AI uses this to reflect your background and voice in answers ({{length}}/{{max}})

notifications.description: Choose which events to receive on which channel. Frequently used notifications are recommended ON.

languageLevel.description: Set your level for <1>reading · speaking · listening · writing</1> per language. When Q note generates answers, it adapts to your level — <2>avoiding overly difficult words and using easier-to-pronounce sentences</2>.<3></3>The <4>reading · speaking levels</4> matter most for languages you'll read aloud (e.g. English).
languageLevel.unsetHint: "—" (unset) means no level adjustment for that language — answers use defaults.

expertise.label: Expertise level
expertise.novice_sample: Plain language only. Avoid jargon when possible.
expertise.beginner_sample: Mostly plain language. Brief gloss for key terms.
expertise.intermediate_sample: Use terms as-is. Short context when helpful.
expertise.advanced_sample: Precise terms and end-to-end flow focus.
expertise.expert5_sample: Exact terminology, depth, assumptions and limits.
expertise.hint: This is <1>your level as the speaker</1>, not the listener's. Expert keeps precise terminology; novice uses plain language.

voice.description: To <1>automatically recognize your own speech</1> during meetings, register your voice. If your meetings use multiple languages, <2>register once per language</2>. A voice registered in English will not reliably recognize Korean speech.
voice.empty: No voice registered yet. Choose a language below and start recording.
voice.addLangPrompt: Pick a language to <1>start recording immediately</1>
voice.verifyHint: Records 5 seconds of your current voice and checks whether it matches the stored fingerprint

recorder.sampleLabel: {{label}} · Please read the sentence below naturally (minimum {{minSec}}s)
recorder.hintLine: Finish the sentence and press "Finish Recording" yourself. Automatically stops at {{hardMax}}s.

privacy.item1: <1>Registered data</1>: Raw audio is not stored. Only the 256-dim vector (mathematical features) extracted by the Resemblyzer model is saved to the DB, and the original voice <2>cannot be reconstructed</2> from it. This is why there is no playback feature.
privacy.item2: <1>Usage</1>: Automatically detect your speech during meetings and merge your utterances after meetings end. Never sent to external services.
privacy.item3: <1>Meeting audio</1>: Temporarily buffered in memory during meetings and discarded immediately when the meeting ends.
privacy.item4: <1>Right to delete</1>: You can revoke your registration at any time via the "Delete" or "Delete All" buttons above.

confirm.deleteLangMessage: Delete the {{label}} voice registration? This language will no longer be used for self-detection in future meetings.
confirm.deleteAllMessage: Delete the voice fingerprints of all registered languages? This action cannot be undone.

messages.errorTooShortVerify: Verification failed: recording must be at least {{minSec}}s (current {{elapsed}}s). Please try again.
messages.errorTooShortRegister: Registration failed: recording must be at least {{minSec}}s (current {{elapsed}}s). Please read the full sentence and press "Finish Recording".

integrations.defPersonal: What you connect here is your own personal account, visible only to you — not to your workspace teammates. (e.g., connecting your personal Gmail shows that mail only to you in Q mail, separate from company mail.)
integrations.defTeam: Shared company connections (company Google Drive, shared calendar, main mailbox) are shared by all members and managed in workspace settings below.
integrations.mailSub2: Connect any email — Gmail, Naver, Daum, your company mailbox — and receive it in your Q mail inbox (visible only to you). Add or reconnect from "My email accounts".

accountDeletion.title: Delete account
accountDeletion.desc: When you delete your account, your personal data is permanently anonymized after {{days}} days. You can recover it by signing in again during the grace period.
accountDeletion.exportHint: We recommend exporting your data before deleting.
accountDeletion.blockTransferBody: You own the workspaces below. Transfer ownership to another member or clear them before deleting your account.
accountDeletion.blockAdminTitle: You are the only platform admin
accountDeletion.blockAdminBody: Assign another admin before deleting your account.
accountDeletion.blockedTooltip: Resolve the items above before deleting.
accountDeletion.soloWarn: These empty workspaces will be deleted along with your account:
accountDeletion.confirmWarn: This becomes irreversible after {{days}} days. Your personal data, private vault, and meeting notes are permanently deleted. Messages and task history in workspaces remain as “Deleted user”.
accountDeletion.errOauth: Social-login accounts need email verification (OTP). Please contact support.
accountDeletion.errGeneric: Could not process the request. Please try again shortly.
